MERIDIAN - Account Frozen - Action Required

Dear Golden Customer,

Your Meridian account (ACC-GOLDEN) has been frozen and all services are currently
suspended.

ACCOUNT DETAILS
---------------
Account ID: ACC-GOLDEN
Reason:     Non-payment of outstanding invoices

To restore access to your account, please contact our support team immediately:

  support@meridian.io

Our team will work with you to resolve this as quickly as possible.

--
